original_query: select s_name, s_address from supplier, nation where s_suppkey in ( select ps_suppkey from partsupp where ps_partkey in ( select p_partkey from part where p_name like 'burlywood%' ) and ps_availqty > ( select 0.5 * sum(l_quantity) from lineitem where l_partkey = ps_partkey and l_suppkey = ps_suppkey and l_shipdate >= date '1994-01-01' and l_shipdate < date '1994-01-01' + interval '1' year ) ) and s_nationkey = n_nationkey and n_name = 'ETHIOPIA' order by s_name;
rewritten_query:
WITH lineitem_sum AS (
    SELECT l_partkey, l_suppkey, 0.5 * SUM(l_quantity) AS half_sum
    FROM lineitem
    WHERE l_shipdate BETWEEN DATE '1994-01-01' AND DATE '1994-12-31'
    GROUP BY l_partkey, l_suppkey
)
SELECT s_name, s_address
FROM supplier
JOIN nation ON s_nationkey = n_nationkey AND n_name = 'ETHIOPIA'
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM partsupp
    JOIN part ON partsupp.ps_partkey = part.p_partkey AND part.p_name LIKE 'burlywood%'
    JOIN lineitem_sum ON partsupp.ps_partkey = lineitem_sum.l_partkey 
        AND partsupp.ps_suppkey = lineitem_sum.l_suppkey
    WHERE partsupp.ps_suppkey = supplier.s_suppkey
    AND partsupp.ps_availqty > lineitem_sum.half_sum
)
ORDER BY s_name;

rewrite_suggestion.produced_suggestion: Precomputed the lineitem sum in a CTE to avoid recalculating it for each row in partsupp
Replaced nested IN subqueries with EXISTS and explicit JOINs for better performance
Used BETWEEN for date range instead of separate comparisons
Calculated the date '1994-01-01' + interval '1' year as '1994-12-31'
